_comment: ALEPH Protocol Node Registry — community-maintained list of known nodes. Submit a PR to register yours.

nodes.label: Origin Node
nodes.description: Reference implementation — CortexDB ALEPH node. Hosts the Sovereign Forge corpus and genome.

how_to_register.step_1: Spin up a CortexDB ALEPH node: uvicorn cortex.api:app --port 8765
how_to_register.step_3: Submit a PR adding your node to the nodes array above
